creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'll land a slightly different version:
- Since the port was not created by you, I'm restoring the "Created by" line, as the author has not indicated it was fine to remove it.
- I'm removing the commented out line setting PORTREVISION. There's no need to keep a dead line there.
- I'm adding a comment explaining why CONFIGURE_ENV is set like I suggested you did.
